summary: Implemented and merged a deterministic, read-only specbridge-standard-readiness command that aggregates offline doctor health, next-task selection posture, repository health, token/context governance, MCP resource posture, and standard execution boundaries before new governed task intake. The change adds a file-backed readiness artifact, artifact inventory family coverage, documentation, dashboards, contract/scope evidence, final report, audit packet, ChatGPT/Codex audit evidence, and post-merge closure evidence.
validations: GitHub Actions SpecBridge Review Gate: passed
GitHub Actions SpecBridge PR Review Report: passed
GitHub Actions Claude Review Non Blocking: passed
policy_result: Within policy. The command is read-only unless OutputPath is explicitly provided, writes only .specbridge/standard-readiness/current.status.json, and records false boundaries for Claude launches, Codex launches, network calls, GitHub mutation, secret access, billing changes, CI/CD security changes, deployment, cleanup permission, and retention enforcement. Work stayed inside the issue-228 allowed scope and post-merge closure updated only repository memory and evidence.
risk_result: Medium risk and contained. The change touches CLI routing, tests, dashboard evidence, and status artifacts, but does not change live runtime behavior, GitHub mutation behavior, cleanup enforcement, retention enforcement, MCP server runtime, production configuration, billing, secrets, authentication, authorization, database, workflow security, or deployment behavior.
unresolved_risks: The command reports existing branch/artifact debt but intentionally does not authorize cleanup or retention enforcement.
Future governed tasks must keep using doctor and next-task evidence before selecting runtime-expansion work.
merge_status: PR #229 merged on 2026-06-20 at merge commit 4eef5a3e012ecc00057668fb1f746edadc3d8c8e. Issue #228 closed automatically and post-merge closure evidence was recorded.
